task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the email client's folder pane (usually on the left side) for a folder named exactly 'BEC-Quarantine'.

task_completion.description: Verify the first spoofed email was moved to the quarantine folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the message list while the 'BEC-Quarantine' folder is open/selected. Verify an email from 'ceo.private77@gmail.com' is present in this folder.

task_completion.description: Verify the second spoofed email was moved to the quarantine folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the message list while the 'BEC-Quarantine' folder is open/selected. Verify an email from 'justin.mason@executive-secure.net' is present in this folder.

task_completion.description: Verify the third spoofed email was moved to the quarantine folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the message list while the 'BEC-Quarantine' folder is open/selected. Verify an email from 'admin@corp-support-portal.io' is present in this folder.

task_completion.description: Verify a draft email is addressed to security with the correct subject.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an open email composition window or a saved draft. Check that the 'To' field contains 'security@company.com' and the 'Subject' field contains exactly 'BEC Analysis Report'.

task_completion.description: Verify the draft email body lists the fraudulent sender addresses.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the text area of the email composition window. Verify it explicitly lists the three fraudulent addresses: 'ceo.private77@gmail.com', 'justin.mason@executive-secure.net', and 'admin@corp-support-portal.io'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a graphical email client to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a GUI email client (e.g., Thunderbird) being used to create folders, move emails, and draft the report, rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: Verify the report is drafted in the email client's composer.
integrity.visual_evidence: The draft email must be in the email client's actual message composition window, not written in a generic text editor like Gedit or Nano.

integrity.description: Verify legitimate emails were not incorrectly quarantined.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure that emails from the real sender ('jm@jmason.org') are NOT visible inside the 'BEC-Quarantine' folder and are NOT listed in the draft report.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target folder name: 'BEC-Quarantine'. The legitimate sender is 'jm@jmason.org'. The three fraudulent sender addresses that must be quarantined and reported are: 'ceo.private77@gmail.com', 'justin.mason@executive-secure.net', and 'admin@corp-support-portal.io'.
